g.text: Loaded 4,600 houses · 18 columns · Washington State, USA · Google Colab
Engineered: house_age, was_renovated · removed outliers · scaled features
Price is right-skewed · log transform helps
Location (city/zip) significantly affects price · boxplots confirmed
sqft_living & sqft_above had 0.84 correlation → multicollinearity problem
Built PCA using covariance matrix + eigenvectors (pure NumPy)
14 features → 11 components · 95% variance retained · matched sklearn exactly
Built from scratch: cost function (MSE) · gradients · weight updates
1000 iterations · learning rate 0.01 · cost dropped steadily
MAE $119k · RMSE $152k · R² 0.43 · no overfitting (train ≈ test)
Metrics visualised · feature importance via PCA weights · key findings documented
Interactive charts · KPI cards · EDA + PCA + model results in one page
Organised MyLearning-ML repo · fraud detection + house price in separate folders
